summary: Comprehensive testing of Talla Bâti Concept landing page completed. Backend APIs fully functional (6/6 tests passed). Frontend features working well with excellent responsive design and bilingual support. Minor issue with contact form dropdown selector stability.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown selector has stability issues during automation testing, causing timeout on click
ui_bugs.impact: Form submission works without project type, but dropdown interaction is unstable

passed_tests: Hero section with background image and CTAs
Navigation menu with all section links working
About section with contact info display
Gallery slider with navigation arrows and dots
Why Us section with 4 argument cards
Google Maps embed in contact section
Floating WhatsApp button visibility and positioning
Mobile responsive design and mobile menu
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider improving contact form dropdown stability by adding proper wait states or using a different UI component library for better automation compatibility. The issue is minor and doesn't affect user functionality.
